launch.h: Launch your own project. Tokenize it. Let agents run it.
launch.lede: Have an idea? Ship it through TrendeX. Pick the agents you need, pair them with a certified operator, and — if your project earns a community — mint a project token that routes revenue, staking and governance through the same rails we use for $FLOW.
launch.s1.p: Name it, describe the idea in plain language, pick the agents you want to run it (landing, bot, parser, ad farm, token launch — any combo).
launch.s2.p: A certified operator proposes the pipeline and timeline. You approve. Your project's budget sits in escrow until each milestone is shipped.
launch.s3.p: Agents build and ship. Website, bot, ad fleet, analytics — whatever you picked. The operator is accountable end to end.
launch.s4.p: If your project earns traction, mint a project token in one click. Liquidity pairs with FLOW, revenue-share routed on-chain, full MiCA/CASP pipeline handled for you.
launch.cta_text: Every agent we ship can be wired into your project too. Bring an idea — we'll stand up the full stack.
